programme.desc: Playboy jewelry mogul turns anti-fur investigator. Also features fashion legend Tim Gunn.

programme.title: Life-extending, Anti-Aging Talk
programme.desc: NY Times bestselling author Dr. Michael Greger reveals... How Not to Age. Wouldn't you like to know?

programme.title: The Invisible Vegan
programme.desc: This film explores the problem of unhealthy dietary patterns in the African-American community.

programme.title: Long Gone WIld
programme.desc: If you liked the documentary Blackfish, this film picks up where Blackfish left off.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Airtime Ep32: The Titans of Windsurfing - Maui, Hawaii
programme.desc: Big-wave windsurfing history catches up with the present as European Champion Tristan Boxford takes us inside the progression of the sport. On Maui, Hawaii, meet the legends; hear how it all started and where it's going. Hang out with pioneers like Robby Naish, Jason Polakow, the Angulo brothers, as well as windsurfing's present rulers Levi Siver, Kauli Seadi and Daida Moreno. From board-shaping to riding big waves at Jaws and Hookipa, learn about the birthplace of a sport.

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep613: Whitewater Kayaking Africa’s Zambezi River
programme.desc: World-renowned kayaker Steve Fisher brings together a crew of big-water pros to experience the force of Africa’s mighty Zambezi River at record levels. Steeped in the brotherhood of kayaking, Fisher, and his fellow paddlers, run head-on into some of the most radical rapids ever recorded

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep107
programme.desc: Liquid Edge highlights the kiteboarding doc With A Kite; profiles one of surfing’s greatest legends, Tom Carroll; checks out the O’Neill Coldwater Classic in Canada; and unveils Sligo, Ireland…an extreme surf sweet spot. Also featured is female big wave surfer, Maya Gabriel; an inside look at Pipeline from The Essence of Surfing; and wakeboarding innovator Dean Lavelle gives us his view on wakeboarding today.

programme.title: The Great Barrier Reef: World's most amazing coral reef
programme.desc: This expedition to the Great Barrier Reef is designed to study the health and resilience of one of the world’s most amazing coral reefs. The expedition’s goal is to collect data about the world's most remote reefs and build a picture of how reefs are faring in today's changing climate.

programme.title: Extinction Soup
programme.desc: Extinction Soup is a documentary about the ground-breaking efforts to stop the international trade of shark fins. The story follows filmmaker Philip Waller on his quest to document the efforts of conservationist Stefanie Brendl, founder of Shark Allies, as she fights to educate lawmakers and helps pass legislation that will ban the trade of fins and the consumption of shark fin soup - the driving force behind the slaughter of millions of sharks every year.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Minisodes - Canyoning, Jet Ski Free Ride, and Feeding Stingrays
programme.desc: The Deap Canyoning Team defies logic as they leap from high cliffs into deep canyon pools. This realatively new extreme sport called Canyoning, is breathtaking and spectacular viewing!

programme.title: Xplash Ep107
programme.desc: Xplash brings you spectacular water-related action from around the globe. Today we'll catch some big-air freestyle kitesurfing in the Canary Islands, bodysurf giant waves in Ireland, go whitewater kayaking in Iceland and check out Hydro Flight at the Poseidon Games in Australia.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 01
programme.desc: Elena Hight is one of the most accomplished women in snowboarding history. Interestingly, her passion for boardsports culture originated in her home state of Hawaii on the island of Kauai. This is where Elena’s Microdose series begins. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Papa Mike, Chris Owen, Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 02
programme.desc: From the moment she strapped into a snowboard, Elena Hight has been an innovative and visionary force in women’s snowboarding. In Episode 2 of her Microdose series, we take a look at two of Elena’s greatest achievements. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Scotty Lago and Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 03
programme.desc: At age 16, during the 2006 Torino Olympics, Elena Hight was the youngest American to compete in Women’s Halfpipe. In 2010, at the Vancouver Olympics, she sowed the seeds of change to come. In Episode 3 of Elena’s Microdose series we explore more. Featuring Selema Masekela, Papa Mike and Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 04
programme.desc: Failure in life can be our biggest teacher. In Episode 4 of her Microdose series, we learn how Elena Hight embraced failure on the global stage, embarked on transformative change, and unlocked her next level. Featuring Selema Masekela, Hana Beaman, Spencer O'Brien, Jamie Anderson, and Jeremy Jones.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 05
programme.desc: When Elena Hight made the surprising decision to set aside her Olympic routine to pursue backcountry riding, she astonished her peers and mentors. In Episode 5 of her Microdose series, we learn how and why Elena made the leap. Featuring Jeremy Jones, Hana Beaman, Todd Jones, and Jamie Anderson.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: On The Verge
programme.desc: In the mountains behind the coastal town of Powell River, BC, rock climbers have spent decades quietly pioneering routes on some of the largest granite walls in Canada. As the landscape comes under threat of logging, the climbing community faces an uncertain future. Lives! Logs! Legacies!

programme.title: 12 Dogs Drive
programme.desc: Facing incredible physical and emotional challenges, a musher and his dog sled team travel from Churchill Manitoba, three thousand kilometres through the wilderness to their new home in Saint John, New Brunswick Canada.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Dopamine
programme.desc: Dopamine is a naturally occurring chemical produced by the human brain, which controls movement and reward. In the world of progressive snowboarding, the joy of physical movement and the reward of being outside are the two greatest factors motivating riders to evolve and innovate. The Absinthe Films documentary Dopamine captures professional snowboarders pushing boundaries and chasing storms across the Chilkats, Valhallas, Monashees, Dolomites, and Pyrenees mountains.

programme.title: Midlife Crisis Presents: Fast Forward
programme.desc: Midlife Crisis is back with Fast Forward. Featuring the age-defying shredders John Jackson, Blaise Rosenthal, Kevin Jones, Todd Richards, Chad Otterstrom, Daniel Franck, and more. We’re here for it, and so are you.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Kimmy Fasani
programme.desc: Over the course of her career, snowboarder Kimmy Fasani has won the coveted “Women’s Rider of The Year Award” from TransWorld Snowboarding Magazine, and the “Women’s Video Part of The Year Award” from Snowboarder Magazine. This fascinating documentary captures Fasani’s first time riding in Alaska.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Brandon Cocard
programme.desc: An early morning of magic in Haines, Alaska with the Absinthe Films crew. Featuring: Brandon Cocard Kimmy Fasani, Nicolas Müller

programme.title: Echo Chamber
programme.desc: In 2020, Brandon Cocard dropped “Echo Chamber,” featuring cameos from Miles Fallon, Kazu Kokubo, Taylor Elliott, Brendon Rego, Kevin Backstrom, Mike Rav, Kaede Yasunaga, Keisuke Yoshida and Chris Beresford. Filmed in Hokkaido, Japan and Salt Lake City, Utah by Sam Tuor. Music by Cocard and friends.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: AfterForever
programme.desc: When resistance fades, growth begins. AfterForever is a meditation on change, exploring evolution in snowboarding and life, and asking what happens when one chapter ends and another begins.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Horsewomen
programme.desc: This week Ride celebrates three extraordinary horsewomen and the captivating connection they have with their equine friends. We showcase exhebition work from American dressage star Sabine Schut-Kery, experience life through a lens with Poland’s fine art horse photographer Katarzyna Okrzesik-Mikolajek, and witness the holistic approach to healing in South West England with renowned trainer Connie Cox.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 5: Heroes Healers
programme.desc: This week Ride exercises military precision with the mounts of the Household Cavalry at the British Army’s London Barracks, and sees second chances given to troubled residents at Achterhoek horse shelter in the Netherlands. We’re in the back seat with Polish driving expert Piotr Mazurek and catch up with this year’s Longines FEI Rising Star Award winner, Germany’s Greta Busacker.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape
programme.desc: Take an aerial journey through Norway's breathtaking winter landscapes, flying over snow-covered fjords, the Atlantic Ocean Road, and picturesque villages like Bud. Immerse yourself in the natural sounds and quiet beauty of this remarkable country.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in stunning nature scenes, accompanied by piano music and calming sounds. Let the beauty of mountains, forests, lakes, and seas relax your mind and promote tranquility.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Water
programme.desc: Reconnect with nature from your couch. Enjoy a relaxation video of Maui's northwestern shore, featuring stunning ocean views, sunsets, palm trees, and vibrant skies. Perfect for a calming escape.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The big KTM 990 Adventure is Austria’s answer to BMW's bestselling R 1200 GS. Is KTM's allrounder for streets, gravel roads and long distance travels a worthy opponent for the dominating Bavarian bike? Also: travel enduros are put to the test as we accompany two German adventurers on their 31-day, 5800-kilometre bike tour through Thailand, Laos and Cambodia.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Stunt world champion Chris Pfeiffer test drives the BMW F 800 R and explains why he is rather excited about the performance and handling of this robust and agile roadster. Also: a look behind the scenes of German helmet manufacturer Schuberth Helme's testing and development procedures. And: German actor Jürgen Vogel puts his new Ducati 1198 SP to the test at the Nürburgring.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Whether taking it easy and cruising, or firing it up and drifting - trikes, scooters and three-wheeled bike conversions all have their own charm and driving dynamics, especially the trikes. We take a closer look at four rather exotic motorcycles: the Rewaco RF1 Turbo, Piaggio's MP3 and bike conversions for the Suzuki 800 Intruder and the Triumph Rocket III Touring.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: We took a look at Mercedes-Benz's first convertible model in their S-class. Also: for the Chevrolet Camaro's 50th anniversary in 2016 the brand released the sixth generation of their classic. And: a mountain cruise with the Corvette C7 convertible.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Nissan's all-wheel monster GT-R had to prove its winter suitability and the new Porsche 911 with turbo engine was taken to its limits in Finnish Lapland. Also: the Mercedes-Benz S 500 plug-in hybrid.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: For over 80 years the British county of Cheshire has been home to one of the most exclusive car manufacturers: Bentley Motors. At Bentley, however, traditionally not only luxury plays a role, but also performance.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: The leading suspension component manufacturer H offers the entire product range from lowering springs to stabilisers and shock absorbers for use in racing and production vehicles.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Swiss tuning company O.CT turned the Lamborghini Huracan into an even more furious beast. Also: the Cadillac CTS-V looks like a regular limousine, but at a second glance it reveals its monstrous power.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: We took a look at Mercedes-Benz's first convertible model in their S-class. Also: for the Chevrolet Camaro's 50th anniversary in 2016 the brand released the sixth generation of their classic. And: a mountain cruise with the Corvette C7 convertible.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: The Lexus RX 450h is the second revised full hybrid SUV by Toyota's luxury brand. Also: introducing the concept behind the Mazda Artega SE. And: BMW's pilot project ActiveE.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: In 2012, Audi presented the A1 E-Tron, a little city sportster with electric propulsion and a range extender. Also: the Hyundai Veloster. And: e-caravaning with Knaus Tabbert hybrid solutions and the Mercedes E-Class Blue Efficiency.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Station Wagons like the Volvo V60 Polestar aren't just family vans anymore but basically very roomy sports cars. Mercedes followed a more luxurious approach with their E43 AMG T model. And: the ultimate powerhouse station wagon, the Audi RS6.

programme.title: A Day At DIBS
programme.desc: Dubai International Boat Show, the most trusted and established marine industry exhibition in the Middle East. Despite misconceptions claiming luxury yachts to be the main attraction in this event, the DIBS offer a much wider variety of expositions on nautical news, sports and lifestyle. It differs from other shows as it has a more exclusive clientele and many professionals of this world are yearning to come.You will adventure into one of Dubai’s most prestigious shows featuring the latest releases of yachts and boats from both local and international builders together with the innovations in marine equipment and accessories.Discover all its secret gems with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2 - Brac – Hvar
programme.desc: In this episode we are taking you to a surfer's paradise – the island of Brač! We are on a journey to find out why Brač is called by many the island of a million olives, and we are going to explore the beautiful Pakleni islands that are close to this location. Get to know the fantastic wines of the island of Hvar and treat ourselves to some drunk lobster.

programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Point of Fear
programme.desc: When Mark, Parker, Melissa, and Karen decide to go camping in the small town of Pleasant Point, they find the town has much to offer... including a string of brutal murders.

programme.title: Holistay
programme.desc: Two couples, who do not know each other, double book a vacation house in San Diego and strange events begin to happen. "Things are not as they appear."

programme.title: Weekend Killer
programme.desc: Detective's Joey Moretti and Patricia Stevens are trying to track down a serial killer that preys on young attractive women, leaving only cryptic messages carved into their flesh as clues! Joey struggles to keep himself together as the investigation leads him closer and closer to the deranged killer!

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E03 - Engine Trouble
programme.desc: Bad weather in the Aleutians has stranded Charlie Summerville and his construction team at Volcano Bay, while Pat Harvie's old cars are having engine issues.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E04 - Building a Wilderness Cabin
programme.desc: At Volcano Bay, nerves begin to fray for Charlie Summerville and his team as they embark on constructing the wilderness cabin.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E42 - Diana A Model Princess
programme.desc: Diana's fashion sense was something people often looked at closely. She had a knack for picking outfits that were both stylish and sophisticated, which always grabbed attention. Her hats were another standout feature; she often wore elegant designs that added a touch of grace to her look. Her hair was also iconic, usually styled neatly with a slight bounce, perfectly framing her face and adding to her elegant appearance.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E33 - Prince Edward and Sophie Rhys-Jones
programme.desc: The Real Story takes us inside a simple royal love tale. It offers a glimpse behind the scenes of how a Prince ended up falling for a girl from a regular middle-class family.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S01:E01 - Alpine Ghosts
programme.desc: Mario takes on the unforgiving alpine mountains of the south island of New Zealand in a fallow deer hunt with his bow, and cooks an impressive venison pie dish.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S01:E02 - Deadly Outback
programme.desc: In the outback of Australia where everything is trying to kill you. It's monsoon season when no one attempts to roam around with salt water crocodiles lurking. Mario links up with a long time friend in search of a wild Buffalo.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E07 - Interstate Travel
programme.desc: To slow the spread of CWD, or chronic wasting disease, Michigan conservation officers work Opening Day to make sure no deer come in from infected states; the Wildlife Disease Lab checks suspect deer.

programme.title: Adam Ondra: Pushing the Limits
programme.desc: Climber Adam Ondra, best in his field, is known for his fearless, record-breaking ascents. An intimate portrait explores his life beyond the headlines

programme.title: Farewell Halong
programme.desc: For generations, the Nguyen family has lived on and off the water amid breathtaking natural scenery. Now they are threatened with forced resettlement.

programme.title: Floating
programme.desc: A lesbian bachelorette’s night out with "the guys", including, alas, her future sperm donor. A mumblecore comedy on a raft.

programme.title: Queen of Niendorf
programme.desc: In this celebration of childhood, a 10-year-old girl struggles to find her place in a 'boys' world.

programme.title: Kommen und Gehen
programme.desc: This film accompanies the last days of the traditional Hotel Maritim in Halle before it becomes a refugee accommodation.

programme.title: Walking on a Thin Line
programme.desc: Ibo is 26. What bothers him most is simple: its time. Dropped out of school, unsettled lifestyle. Now it's time to change before it's all too late.

programme.title: Marzenka
programme.desc: When Mareks cousin comes to live with him and his family, his life is uprooted.

programme.title: Paradies! Paradies!
programme.desc: Kurdwin Ayub, a member of the European Film Academy, tries to find out why his father falls into euphoria at the very mention of Kurdistan.

programme.title: Hashtag: School Trip
programme.desc: A school class visits the Auschwitz concentration camp in Poland. Buckle up in the bus, go to the toilet, a birthday song for Anja.

programme.title: Zero-G
programme.desc:
"I'm a city kid - born in the smog." Delicately and with great poetry a group of young parcours artists recapture the urban space of their home city of Vienna.
Political art in public space – completely weightless. Accompanied by the gentle sounds of the poetry slammer Fatima Moumouni.

programme.desc: A conscientious civil servant dreams of a career as a musician.

programme.title: The Malibu Beach Vampires
programme.desc: In addition to the traditional bloodsuckers, there are other kinds of vampires, you know...such as some politicians, military people, and evangelists.

programme.title: Running Funny
programme.desc: Michael and Eddie are two broke college graduates who rent an “apartment” from Stan, a cantankerous blind war veteran. As they begin their tumultuous transition into the real world, they quickly discover that finding a job will be more complex than securing their degrees.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: We Are Golden
programme.desc: The Gaels embark on an ambitious mission. One of Canada’s most prominent surgeons lead his team to the 1978 Vanier Cup.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: What's going on inside Area 51, America's most carefully guarded secret?

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Did this pop icon and blond bombshell succumb to a drug overdose in 1962 as we've been led to believe or was she killed for 'knowing too much?"

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: GeneproDX is transforming traditional medicine —bridging Health Tech and AI and providing patients with fast, reliable, and accurate diagnostics. programme.title: Hot and Sweet

programme.desc: Charlie, Bianca and Anna are on their way to see Dalia, who has fallen off the grid since becoming a mum. While Dalia tries to wrangle herself, a sick child and a grumpy husband.

programme.title: All You've Got To Do Is Don't

programme.title: Rescue Your Testimony

programme.title: Move In What You Are Made For

programme.title: It's Not Over
programme.desc: Things really can change for you. Your past is not your prophecy. Stop allowing fear to predict your future, and begin to see it how God sees it. Pastor Jabin Chavez encourages us: “It’s Not Over.”

programme.title: Don't Let The Funeral Fool You
programme.desc: Don’t let the disappointment of this season cause you to quit growing and relying on God. Have a funeral for your expectations, leave it with God, and let Him open your eyes to what’s next.

programme.title: A Recipe For Resentment
programme.desc: If you’ve been feeling pulled in every direction, it might be time to pivot. God isn’t asking you to do everything — He’s asking you to stay close to Him

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Julia flees to defend herself from Marcos, calls for help and calls Max. Ezequiel, armed, arrives at the abandoned house and confronts Marcos. They argue, Marcos loses his head and it is Ezequiel who shoots and then says it was suicide. Pain in the Aragón's house and Fausto swears he will take justice.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila receives a note from El Doliente who advises her not to keep looking for her mother. This worries her and so she tells Max. She also asks him to trust her, but he is tired of her rudeness. They all suspect that it was Ezequiel who killed Marcos.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Claudio receives a call from Pedro warning him to get ready, because Guillermo has been arrested and there is always the possibility that he will end up confessing. Alfonso and Malena are not willing to play Pablo's game. Alberto and Guillermo face to face again, they look at each other with hatred, each one with his own reasons; the whole truth seems to be about to be discovered.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Patricia is not intimidated by Gertrudis, she is ready to make Pablo pay for the physical and psychological violence he exerts on his wife; the lady threatens him fiercely to abandon Malena's defense, while Pablo shows himself triumphant - Guillermo is taken to his cell, when one of the inmates hands him a note with his death sentence: "the fish dies by the mouth".

programme.title: MBTV
programme.desc: programa dedicado al sector agropecuario, donde se analizan temas relacionados con la agricultura, la ganadería y las innovaciones en el campo.

programme.desc: Programa religioso que ofrece enseñanzas y reflexiones sobre la fe.

programme.title: MI MEJOR VERSION
programme.desc: Programa de entretenimiento que ofrece temas variados, noticias frescas y contenido alegre para mantenerte informado y motivado.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila miente sobre su relación con Roberto. Max está muy golpeado y esta situación la aprovecha Astrid que se le insinúa mucho, pero él la rechaza. Ezequiel humillando y maltratando a Leandro, su hijo enfermo.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila dice toda la verdad a Max y confiesa que lo ama, sin embargo, en un nuevo encuentro le pide que confíe en ella mientras trata de resolver el asunto que tanto los atormenta. Roberto, está decidido a matar a Max.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Roberto le pide a Astrid que le consiga un trabajo en Mascarada a cambio de no hacer nada contra Max. Camila confiesa a Max que Roberto la chantajea. Luciano y el inspector interrogan a la Madre Isabel y al Padre Tiziano sobre Rosa Blanco y ellos mienten.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel defiende a Camila de la acusación de Roberto y confronta a Camila. Max, al encontrarla muy triste, le pide que confíe en él. Julia y Gregorio con un plan para que sus padres piensen que no volverán a verse y dejen de seguirlos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Roberto confiesa que fue él quien asesinó a Gabriel para inculpar a Camila. Camila, llora de alegría, al saberse inocente de esa muerte. Max le reitera su incondicional apoyo ratificándole su gran amor. Ezequiel expresa su intención de casarse con Camila

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel rechazado por Camila, la manipula con una nueva oferta de trabajo como asistente de su hija Julia y todo para tratar de conseguir su cercanía. Max, confía en el amor de Camila. Torrealba pide que unan esfuerzos para encontrar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Utopía 7
programme.desc: En un mundo postapocalíptico, una pandilla de jóvenes rebeldes lucha contra los mecanismos de alta tecnología de un sistema informático definitivo que había sido encargado por un grupo de élite para restablecer el orden y el equilibrio.

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: Vigilia
programme.desc: Santiago amanece desnudo y golpeado en medio del desierto. El joven se incorpora muy aturdido y retorna a su casa paterna.

programme.title: El Deseo de Domingo
programme.desc: Narra la historia de Domingo, un adulto mayor que sufre Alzheimer y pasa sus días en un geriátrico en la ciudad de Viedma, desde donde intenta, a toda costa, viajar a la Capital, a San Isidro, a ver el gran premio de turf Carlos Pellegrini. Pero claro, no se trata de cualquier premio, sino el del año 1952. Para eso necesitará de la ayuda de Marcelo, su nieto, quien se encuentra en el dilema de conformarse con su puesto en una dependencia pública o seguir luchando por triunfar con su banda de rock. …

programme.title: Call TV
programme.desc: Lucía, una actriz en decadencia, acepta presentar un programa nocturno de preguntas tontas. Sin darse cuenta de que se ha metido en un gran lío que le hará pasar la peor noche de su vida

programme.title: ¿Quieres Ser Mi Rehén?
programme.desc: Ulises, un diseñador publicitario, es tomado como rehén por una hermosa y misteriosa mujer en el día más importante de su vida y en su propia oficina. Al mismo tiempo, la exesposa de Ulises acude a su oficina y complica todavía más la situación.

programme.title: Cartero
programme.desc: Hernán Sosa es un joven tímido que viene del interior a la ciudad. En su pueblo siempre estuvo enamorado de una chica inalcanzable, Yanina. Hernán consigue trabajo en el correo. Durante el reparto, Hernán descubre que Yanina se encuentra en la ciudad, en la zona de su reparto. En consecuencia, comienza a desplegar sus nuevos conocimientos de cartero para llegar hasta ella. Pero a medida que se acerca, descubre que unos viejos carteros están organizando un robo en el mismo edificio donde trabaja Yanina. Envalentonado por la fuerza del amor, Hernán se enfrentará a los peligros que rodean a Yanina para llegar a declararle lo que siente.

programme.title: Vidas Violentas
programme.desc: integrada por seis cortometrajes escritos y dirigidos por seis de los más connotados directores mexicanos, la película fue realizada y dirigida para concientizar y reducir la violencia de género, el acoso escolar en las escuelas y la violencia doméstica. Proviene de una iniciativa del gobierno en el marco de la campaña basta no violencia

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
